surface_verification.runner: uv run --directory plugins/shipwright-compliance --with pytest --with pyyaml pytest tests/test_gate_probe_orchestration.py tests/test_audit_gate_behavior_probe.py -q
surface_verification.justification: Framework-internal compliance-audit sub-check (A5.8). The CLI runner executes the gate-behavior probe decision-tree + integration tests; the 10 bash/jq end-to-end cases run in CI (skipped on this Windows dev box, identical posture to the sibling shared/tests/test_security_critical_gate.py). No web/API/UI surface.

behaviors.behavior: AC1 — A5.8 FAILs (HIGH) when the gate exits 0 on a CRITICAL fixture (the 2026-06-04 false-green class)
AC2 — A5.8 FAILs when the gate exits 0 on EMPTY or INVALID scan output (not fail-closed)
AC3 — A5.8 PASSes against BOTH real gate flavors (template SARIF + deployed findings.json)
AC4 — A5.8 SKIPs (never FAIL) on absent bash/jq, no run-body, ${{ }} body, clean-sanity failure, timeout/OSError, or SHIPWRIGHT_A5_GATE_PROBE=0
AC5 — Structural A5.1–A5.7 + the audit suite stay green and acquire no bash/jq dependency (conftest opt-out)
behaviors.evidence: Full compliance suite 612 passed / 10 skipped; test_audit_group_a5.py 36 passed with the probe disabled by the package conftest

behaviors.behavior: AC6 — group_a5.py stays within its (bumped) bloat baseline; the new module + test files are <=300 LOC
behaviors.evidence: anti_ratchet_check.py --worktree => status ok (group_a5.py 608->614 baseline bump); gate_behavior_probe.py 298, test files 300/125

behaviors.behavior: Finding contract + crash isolation: run() emits one A5.8 Finding (group A / detective-only / HIGH / cmd-on-fail) and never raises

degraded.condition: bash/jq absent on this local Windows runner: the 10 A5.8 end-to-end probe tests skip locally
degraded.note: They execute in CI (ubuntu ships both, and skip_or_fail_on_missing_binary hard-fails there if absent). The probe's decision tree is fully covered locally by test_gate_probe_orchestration.py (stubs _run_gate). Same ADR-044 posture as the sibling shared/tests/test_security_critical_gate.py.
